prompt: Using evals/files/object-duplicates.graphql, identify object types with exactly the same fields and types, consolidate safe duplicates automatically, and preserve client-facing compatibility by default. Show what you changed and what you skipped.
expectations: Output identifies at least one duplicate object-type group using exact field/type matching criteria.
Output explicitly states that non-breaking behavior is the default and that breaking merges require opt-in.
Output includes a per-group disposition (merged, implementation-only, or skipped) with rationale.
